reasoning: The control SC-8(3) focuses on ensuring transmission confidentiality and integrity through cryptographic protection. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring TLS is enforced for network communications, both at the ingress level and within the cluster. NetworkPolicies can be used to enforce TLS for pod-to-pod communication, while Ingress configurations should ensure TLS is enabled for external communications. Additionally, etcd and the API server should have TLS enabled to protect data in transit.
title: Transmission Confidentiality And Integrity - Transmission confidentiality and integrity | cryptographic protection for messag
